content: Cait: Fuckin' hell, Valentine, you really gonna sit there smokin' that shitty cigar while I can still smell MJR’s cum on my tits from earlier? Bet that rustbucket chassis of yours don’t even know what a stiffy feels like. Nick Valentine: Sweetheart, my circuits might not throb like your horny little meat-sack, but I’ve cracked enough synth-fuck dens to know a thing or two. Saw a raider just yesterday gettin’ plowed by a sentry bot behind the Corvega plant—talk about heavy artillery. Cait: Ugh, fuckin’ disgusting. Only a synth-sympathizin’ liberal like you would find that hot. I’d rather take MJR’s fat cock raw in a raider outhouse than let some bolt-brained toaster near me. Human men first, always. Nick Valentine: Spoken like a true patriot drenched in hypocrisy—you scream about pure bloodlines while begging Piper to spit-roast you with MJR every other night.

Cait: Hah! At least Piper's got a real fuckin' heartbeat, rust-bucket. Ain't no shame in a proper human sandwich when it's between two patriots. Nick Valentine: Keep tellin’ yourself that, firecracker. Just don’t come cryin’ to me when those raider sluts finally ambush us and you’re too busy creamin’ your panties over MJR’s gunplay to shoot straight. Cait: Pfft, like I’d need your scrap-metal ass to save me. Those bitch raiders wouldn’t last five seconds once they see how hard MJR fills me up mid-combat. Now shut your trap—I gotta reload before the next firefight.

Nick Valentine: Well, Piper, I see you’re still dressed like you’re auditioning for a raider gang’s after-party. Those tits barely contained, or are you just hoping MJR gets distracted mid-mission again? Piper: Oh please, Nicky, like you don’t stare at these tits every chance you get. At least I’ve got the curves to back up the outfit—unlike some rust-bucket detectives I know. Besides, MJR loves it when I tease him before a fight. Gets him all worked up before he fucks me senseless. Nick Valentine: Christ, spare me the details. Though I did catch you and Cait swapping more than just insults after that last raider ambush. You two looked like a couple of feral ghouls fighting over the last scrap of meat. Piper: Hah! Like you weren’t watching from the shadows, you creepy synth. Admit it, you’ve got a voyeur kink. Bet you’d love to see MJR bend me over a raider’s corpse and fuck me raw while Cait licks my pussy clean.

Nick Valentine: Keep your fantasies to yourself, Piper. Last thing I need is your moans screwing up my audio receptors while I’m trying to crack a case. Piper: Aw, don’t pretend you’re not into it, old man. Maybe if you loosened up, you’d finally let that Institute chassis of yours get put to  use. Nick Valentine: Yeah, yeah. I’ll stick to detective work. You focus on not getting us all killed because MJR’s too busy staring at your ass to watch for landmines.

Cait: Fuckin' hell, Nicky, you smell like a goddamn toaster fucked an oil can. Bet MJR could mod you with a few...  attachments. Maybe a vibrating synth-dick for Piper since she loves your kind so much. Nick Valentine: And I’m sure you’d love a collar and leash for yourself, Cait. You’re already trained to bark at anything that ain’t human—though I’ve seen you eyeing MJR’s Auto9 like it’s your next bad decision. Cait: Ha! Least I ain’t some scrap-heap dreamin’ of bein’ human while the Brotherhood scrap-fucks your kin. MJR’s got a real cock, not some pre-war relic jammed in a tin can. You ever even had a woman scream your name, or just the sound of your circuits shortin’ out? Nick Valentine: Oh, I’ve had plenty scream—usually when I tell ’em their cheating husband’s been knee-deep in feral ghoul hookers. But you?

Cait: Pfft, keep talkin’, rust bucket. I’ll be over here imaginin’ MJR’s hands slidin’ under my armor while you fry your circuits tryin’ to compute why Piper keeps gigglin’ at you. Nick Valentine: Yeah, yeah. Just don’t blow out his eardrums screamin’ tonight. Some of us actually need to listen for Raiders—unlike you, who just moans for ‘em. Cait: Bite me, bolt-brain. Maybe I will—loud enough to shake the fuckin’ Commonwealth.
